name: ClawMind Local Markdown Context Engine
description: Compresses OpenClaw session context into a local Markdown summary file and assembles context without network calls.

compressionThreshold.description: Trigger compaction when accumulated context characters exceed this threshold.

keepRecentMessages.description: How many of the most recent messages to keep verbatim in the runtime context.

entryCharLimit.description: Maximum character length for each summarized Markdown entry.

summaryDir.description: Optional directory where ClawMind writes generated .md summary files. Defaults next to the session file.

debug.description: Enable verbose plugin logs in the OpenClaw gateway.
